channel.title: Saras Finance - PulseCheck Status
channel.description: Real-time health status for Saras Finance services

item.title: 🟢 RESTORED: Primary API is UP
item.description: Service Primary API (Development Services) has been restored after ~13 minutes.

item.title: 🔴 OUTAGE: Primary API is DOWN
item.description: Service Primary API (Development Services) went down. Status: Error
